### Highlights | 更新内容

- 自由鼠标（原远控模式）现在可以更可靠地在串流窗口、其他屏幕和不同 Space 之间切换；想临时去操作别的显示器上的应用时，不必再先结束串流。
  Free Mouse mode now switches more reliably between the stream window, other displays, and different Spaces, so you can jump to apps on another monitor without ending the session first.
- 修复了一批鼠标捕获与恢复问题，包括进入游戏、切换全屏/窗口、窗口重新获得焦点后的接管时机；对《穿越火线》这类更依赖输入时序的游戏，排查和恢复都会更稳定。
  Fixed a batch of mouse capture and recovery issues around game entry, fullscreen/windowed transitions, and focus changes, making takeover timing more reliable in games that are sensitive to input timing such as CrossFire.
- 新增“输入诊断”开关，并把调试日志重新设计为“原始日志 + 浓缩日志”两层结构：原始日志保留完整细节，浓缩日志会把发现噪音、网络噪音和主机身份不匹配合并成更容易阅读和回传的摘要。
  Added an Input Diagnostics toggle and redesigned debug logging into layered raw and curated logs: raw logs keep the full detail, while curated logs merge discovery noise, network noise, and host identity mismatches into summaries that are easier to read and share.
- 新增串流调优设置与 AWDL 稳定性辅助项，在一些网络环境下更容易微调延迟、缓冲和连接建立行为。
  Added stream tuning controls and an AWDL stability helper, making it easier to tune latency, buffering, and connection startup behavior on some networks.

### Maintenance | 维护更新

- 调整了原始日志与浓缩日志的轮转策略，并补齐了这批改动对应的双语发布说明，方便继续按版本生成成对的 Release Notes。
  Updated raw and curated log rotation behavior and added the paired bilingual release notes for this batch so future releases can keep the same per-version release note format.
- 调整了 AWDL helper 的构建行为：在没有签名身份的环境里不再阻塞发版构建，而有签名的构建仍然可以继续打包专用 helper。
  Adjusted AWDL helper packaging so unsigned release builds no longer fail, while signed builds can still bundle the dedicated helper.
